current_commit_message: Initial commit - Amazon Ads MCP framework
fix: resolve ModuleNotFoundError for openapi import
fix: handle quoted AMAZON_AD_API_PACKAGES on Windows
feat!: add build scripts to version control
fix: remove .build/ directory from version control
split the Amazon Ads v1 into packages
add Amazon Ads profile discovery tools and cache refresh
optimize for token use in context
cover gaps for tokens and improve hints
fix: resolve CI test failures after merge from main
ci: drop catalog drift / idempotency jobs (private inputs)
fix(test): sidecar stats invariant must sum rules + overlays
fix(http): apply per-operation vendored media types to Accept header
fix(http): unify Accept-header resolver, prefer highest vN+json
test(http): expand Accept resolver coverage to DSP, BrandMetrics, Reporting
chore: remove committed audit helper script
fix(profile): validate profile_id against cached profile list
fix(profile_listing): surface limit validation errors and cap notices
fix(envelope): classify input-validation errors as mcp_input_validation
test(integration): mock cached profile list in set/clear profile smoke tests
fix(middleware): default MCP_STRICT_UNKNOWN_FIELDS=true; exempt sidecar aliases
fix(middleware): jsonschema constraint validation in dispatcher (R1)
fix(profile_listing): R3 — pagination guidance when limit > MAX_SEARCH_LIMIT
fix(code_mode): R5 — wrap unknown-tool errors in v1 envelope JSON
fix(middleware): R2 — per-ad-product conditional maxResults cap validator
fix(middleware): R2 v2 — expand per-ad-product cap table per wire trace
